'''âv-sh-sh-n''' ('''kavashenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:molest|molest]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-sh-sh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:molest|molest]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-sh-sh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kavashenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivashenoko|thivashenoko]] || [[word:jivashenoko|jivashenoko]] || [[word:shivashenoko|shivashenoko]] || [[word:kivashenoko|kivashenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
